summary: Iteration 89 - Cooperative Referral System Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All 8 backend tests passed. The main bugs have been fixed: 1) GET /api/cooperative-referral/my-code now returns 200 (not 403) for cooperative users, 2) coop_name displays correctly (not 'N/A'), 3) Share message in CooperativeReferralPage.jsx includes the application URL (https://shade-cover-calc.preview.emergentagent.com/register). Frontend Register.jsx shows coop_name input and sponsor_referral_code input fields correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: POST /api/auth/register with user_type=cooperative creates user with coop_name, referral_code (GL-COOP-XXX-XXXX format)
PASS: POST /api/auth/register with sponsor_referral_code links new cooperative to sponsor (sponsor_id, sponsor_referral_code, affiliated_at set)
PASS: GET /api/cooperative-referral/my-code returns 200 for cooperative users (BUG FIX VERIFIED - was returning 403)
PASS: GET /api/cooperative-referral/my-code returns coop_name correctly (BUG FIX VERIFIED - was showing 'N/A')
PASS: GET /api/cooperative-referral/my-affiliates returns list of affiliated cooperatives
PASS: POST /api/cooperative-referral/validate validates referral codes correctly
PASS: Frontend Register.jsx shows coop_name input with data-testid='coop-name-input'
PASS: Frontend Register.jsx shows sponsor_referral_code input with data-testid='sponsor-code-input'
PASS: Frontend CooperativeReferralPage.jsx share message includes application URL (https://shade-cover-calc.preview.emergentagent.com/register)
PASS: AuthContext.jsx forwards sponsor_referral_code in registration payload

test_credentials.note: Admin account is NOT a cooperative type, so it correctly gets 403 on /my-code endpoint

seed_data_creation: Created test cooperatives during testing (prefixed with test_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 verified the cooperative referral system bug fixes. The main issues fixed were: 1) 403 Forbidden on GET /api/cooperative-referral/my-code - now returns 200 for cooperative users, 2) coop_name showing 'N/A' - now displays correctly, 3) Share message missing app URL - now includes full URL. The fixes involved: AuthContext.jsx forwarding sponsor_referral_code, auth.py setting 'id' field after insert, and CooperativeReferralPage.jsx including window.location.origin in share message.

coop_name_na_bug.after: coop_name displays correctly from user data

share_message_url_bug.before: Share message did not include application URL

sponsor_referral_code_forwarding.before: AuthContext.jsx was NOT forwarding sponsor_referral_code to backend
sponsor_referral_code_forwarding.after: sponsor_referral_code is forwarded and new cooperative is linked to sponsor
